quick_skim.title: Robustness of Deep Learning Models for PV Power Forecasting under NWP Forecast Errors: A Spatiotemporal and Physically Interpretable Analysis
quick_skim.abstract: Engineering use of AI forecasting models requires not only high nominal accuracy but also predictable behavior under uncertain inputs. In photovoltaic (PV) forecasting, this requirement is especially challenging because numerical weather prediction (NWP) errors are temporally correlated, state dependent, and physically coupled across variables. Existing evaluations, however, often rely on perfect forecast assumptions or simplistic perturbations that do not reflect these characteristics. This study presents a physically constrained robustness evaluation framework based on simulation, using virtual PV power as a controlled response variable to isolate the propagation of input uncertainty from confounders at the plant level. Six representative machine learning and deep sequence models, including PatchTST, GRU, N-HITS, and LightGBM, are evaluated under dynamic NWP perturbations with heteroscedasticity modulated by clear-sky conditions and Erbs reconstruction that preserves radiation consistency. The results show that sequence models provide stronger noise filtering and temporal resilience than a strong tabular baseline under medium to high disturbance regimes. SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) and Integrated Gradients (IG) further support a feature reallocation tendency at the case level, in which predictive reliance shifts from corrupted future forecasts toward more stable historical observations and deterministic physical priors. A Pareto analysis of accuracy under clean conditions, robustness, and computational latency then translates these findings into engineering implications for robustness assessment and model selection under forecast uncertainty.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: deep learning robustness under NWP errors for forecasting, similar to air quality forecasting bias correction
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 深度学习在数值天气预报误差下的鲁棒性评估，与空气质量预报偏差校正类似
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 深度学习在数值天气预报误差下的鲁棒性评估，与空气质量预报偏差校正类似
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 深度学习在数值天气预报误差下的鲁棒性评估，与空气质量预报偏差校正类似
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Physically constrained robustness framework for deep learning PV power forecasting under realistic NWP errors, applicable to air quality forecasting.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该文针对光伏功率预测中数值天气预报误差的鲁棒性问题，提出一种基于仿真的物理约束鲁棒性评估框架。通过模拟真实NWP误差传播，分析了深度学习模型的行为。方法可迁移至空气质量预报中考虑NWP误差的偏差校正与数据同化，但未涉及具体应用。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该文针对光伏功率预测中数值天气预报误差的鲁棒性问题，提出一种基于仿真的物理约束鲁棒性评估框架。通过模拟真实NWP误差传播，分析了深度学习模型的行为。方法可迁移至空气质量预报中考虑NWP误差的偏差校正与数据同化，但未涉及具体应用。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for PM2.5 ozone air quality forecasting bias correction and data assimilation

quick_skim.title: Operator-Split Bayesian Learning for Elliptic PDEs with Unequal Interior and Boundary Data
quick_skim.abstract: We propose an operator-split Bayesian learning framework for second-order uniformly elliptic Dirichlet problems with unequal numbers of interior and boundary observations. The data consist of noisy measurements of the source in the domain and noisy measurements of the boundary values. Independent Bayesian neural-network (BNN) priors are assigned to these two quantities, and the resulting product posterior is pushed forward through the elliptic solution operator. We prove that the posterior induced by this construction contracts around the true solution. The contraction radius separates a domain contribution, governed by the second-order elliptic operator, from a boundary contribution, governed by the intrinsic dimension of the boundary. Together with the minimax lower bound of \cite{ZhaoLu2026}, this yields a near-minimax upper bound up to logarithmic factors. Our numerical experiments illustrate the propagation of source and boundary uncertainty and the effects of unequal sampling budgets on the posterior reconstruction.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: operator-split Bayesian learning for elliptic PDEs with uncertainty quantification
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 针对椭圆型偏微分方程的算子分裂贝叶斯学习方法，提供不确定性量化
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 针对椭圆型偏微分方程的算子分裂贝叶斯学习方法，提供不确定性量化
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 针对椭圆型偏微分方程的算子分裂贝叶斯学习方法，提供不确定性量化
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes an operator-split Bayesian learning framework for elliptic PDEs that handles unequal interior and boundary data, providing theoretical guarantees on posterior contraction.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对椭圆型偏微分方程提出了一种算子分裂贝叶斯学习框架，能够处理内外部数据数量不均衡的情况。通过为源项和边界条件分别赋予独立贝叶斯神经网络先验，并利用椭圆解算子的后验推动，证明了后验分布在真实解周围的收缩性。该方法为环境模型中常见的椭圆型方程（如稳态扩散）的贝叶斯反问题提供了理论保障。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对椭圆型偏微分方程提出了一种算子分裂贝叶斯学习框架，能够处理内外部数据数量不均衡的情况。通过为源项和边界条件分别赋予独立贝叶斯神经网络先验，并利用椭圆解算子的后验推动，证明了后验分布在真实解周围的收缩性。该方法为环境模型中常见的椭圆型方程（如稳态扩散）的贝叶斯反问题提供了理论保障。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: physics-informed machine learning for environmental modeling
